title: Smoky Jamaican Fish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoky spices and silky tender fish. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the smoky fish and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the jamaican curry powder and stir to combine.
Add the silky coconut milk, stew tomatoes, salt, and pepper.
Bring the stew to a simmer and cook until the fish is cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
